title: neea collina
intro: Neea collina, also known as the Neea tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Neea collina include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive problems, and support the immune system. Neea collina is often prepared as a decoction or infusion for medicinal use, and it can also be found in herbal supplements or teas, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
